task_completion.description: Verify the spam post is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The post titled 'V1agra Ch3ap Online Buy Now!!!' is no longer visible in the published/draft posts list, or a 'moved to the Trash' notification is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Cloud Computing Trends 2026' and 'AI in Software Development' are categorized as 'Technology' and not 'Uncategorized'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress posts list, the 'Categories' column for these two posts shows 'Technology' and does NOT show 'Uncategorized'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Weekend Hiking Trail Guide' and 'Healthy Meal Prep Ideas' are categorized as 'Lifestyle' and not 'Uncategorized'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress posts list, the 'Categories' column for these two posts shows 'Lifestyle' and does NOT show 'Uncategorized'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Breaking: Local Business Awards Announced' is categorized as 'News' and not 'Uncategorized'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress posts list, the 'Categories' column for this post shows 'News' and does NOT show 'Uncategorized'.

task_completion.description: Verify the two specified drafts are published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress posts list, 'Cloud Computing Trends 2026' and 'Breaking: Local Business Awards Announced' no longer have the '— Draft' label next to their titles.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'featured' tag is added to all five legitimate posts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress posts list, the 'Tags' column for all five legitimate posts displays the tag 'featured'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (e.g., wp-admin), not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the WordPress UI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using WordPress features like 'Quick Edit', 'Bulk Actions', or individual post editor screens.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running WP-CLI commands or SQL queries should be visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Spam post to delete: 'V1agra Ch3ap Online Buy Now!!!'. Posts to recategorize to Technology: 'Cloud Computing Trends 2026', 'AI in Software Development'. Posts to recategorize to Lifestyle: 'Weekend Hiking Trail Guide', 'Healthy Meal Prep Ideas'. Post to recategorize to News: 'Breaking: Local Business Awards Announced'. The 'Uncategorized' category must be removed from all of them. Drafts to publish: 'Cloud Computing Trends 2026', 'Breaking: Local Business Awards Announced'. Tag to add to all 5 legitimate posts: 'featured'.
